description: Desktop runtime scope policy. Every listed Tauri plugin or external navigation surface is denied until a concrete use case adds scoped permissions and validation.

production.rationale: CCD Desktop serves bundled local assets only. Tauri IPC is limited to Tauri's local IPC bridge sources; external navigation, remote frames, object embedding, and form posts are denied by default.

default-src.reason: Allow bundled app assets and Tauri IPC bridge only.

connect-src.reason: Allow same-origin frontend requests and Tauri IPC bridge only.

font-src.reason: Allow bundled fonts and generated icon/font data URLs.

form-action.reason: Desktop shell does not submit external forms.

frame-src.reason: No remote or local frames are required.

img-src.reason: Allow bundled images plus generated data/blob image previews.

object-src.reason: Object/embed content is not part of the desktop shell.

script-src.reason: Only bundled application scripts are allowed; inline script and eval stay denied.

style-src.reason: Only bundled stylesheet assets are allowed; inline style stays denied.

preEnableRequirements: Document the concrete desktop use case.
Add the required Tauri plugin dependency only for that use case.
Add explicit allow and deny scopes before adding a permission to capabilities/default.json.
Validate the policy with desktop security checks and a Tauri build.

requiredScopeBeforeEnable: file type or path constraints when applicable
